welcome_title: Lenor Gift Set — Discover the New Fragrance Collection!
welcome_text_1: Fill out a short survey and receive a large gift set with the new Lenor products — completely free!
welcome_text_2: To celebrate the launch of our new fragrance range, we offer special gift sets! Limited quantity — hurry to receive your set filled with new Lenor fragrances and exclusive brand souvenirs. Be among the first to discover our fresh new collection!
test_1_question: Which Lenor product do you prefer?
test_2_question: In which format do you usually buy Lenor?
test_3_question: What do you like most about Lenor?
test_4_question: Which Lenor product would you like to try?
test_4_option_1: A new fragrance from the fresh collection
test_5_question: How often do you buy Lenor?
test_6_question: Do you want to receive 3 towels and a set of clips for free?
preorder_text_1: You have won a Lenor gift set!
preorder_text_2: Order your Lenor gift set now and receive 3 branded towels and a set of clips as a gift — just for responding quickly! 🎁
order_product_name: Lenor Gift Set + 3 Towels + Set of Clips
order_title: You answered all questions correctly and won a gift! Fill out the form and confirm your information.
thanks_popup_text_1: Find the box that hides the Lenor gift.
thanks_popup_text_2: You just need to choose the correct box. You have three attempts — good luck!
congrats_popup_text_1: You have won a Lenor gift set!
congrats_popup_text_3: 2. Fill in your information and choose a convenient delivery method to receive your Lenor gift set.
